nasb.text: The double hooks, one handbreadth in length, were installed in the house all around; and on the tables was the flesh of the offering.

esv.text: And hooks, a handbreadth long, were fastened all around within. And on the tables the flesh of the offering was to be laid.

cnv.text: 周圍的牆上釘有鈎子，各長七公分半。桌子上放有獻祭的肉。

ccb.text: 廊内四周挂着七点五厘米长的双钩。桌上放着祭肉。
